idea-plugin.name: Cucumber for Python
idea-plugin.description:
Cucumber for Python — full behave support for Gherkin features in IntelliJ IDEA:
  • Resolve & navigate Gherkin steps to their @given/@when/@then Python step definitions
  • Run and Debug feature files (breakpoints in step defs, live test tree)
  • Create step definition quick-fix with parameter inference ({value:d})
Built on the base gherkin cucumber framework via the cucumberJvmExtensionPoint extension point.

💚 Even better together with Cucumber+: install both to get Gherkin ↔ behave breakpoint synchronisation, a "N scenarios" gutter marker on your step definitions, and the full Cucumber+ editing experience on your .feature files.
